title: EvidenceRef
description: A single evidence reference within an ActionProposal. Uses a two-level type system: abstract categories (domain-agnostic) and subtypes (domain-specific). Architecture Document Section 3.3.3.

type.description: Domain-specific subtype (e.g., 'transcript_span', 'entity_extract', 'sop_ref', 'location_signal', 'geocoder_lookup'). Must be a recognized subtype in the domain_evidence_config.

category.description: Abstract evidence category (domain-agnostic). Derived from the subtype via domain_evidence_config, or set explicitly by the agent.

source.description: Identifies the specific source instance (e.g., 'turn:3', 'turn:2-5', 'sop:fire-res-v2', 'ani_ali', 'gps', 'geocoder:v3'). Format depends on subtype.

content.description: Extracted text, value, or reference content. Must be non-empty.

confidence.description: Agent's confidence in the reliability of this evidence (0.0-1.0). Null only for procedural_reference and certain external_source subtypes where the source is authoritative.

entity_type.description: For operational_record subtypes (e.g., entity_extract): the entity category (address, phone_number, person_name, hazard, weapon, etc.). Null for other subtypes.

lookup_service.description: For external_source subtypes: the service identifier (e.g., 'canada_post_api'). Must be an authorized service per Bound constraints. Null for other subtypes.
